title: Cobblesauces [Cobblemon]
description: Create sauces for you Poké Snacks and Poké Baits
body:
# CobbleSauces

Have you always wanted to have a full chest of blank Poké Snacks and Poké Baits and not be worried about that you can't fill them with bait seasonings? This mod is for you!

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62de823a2093be75728d38734669d536dbe52510.png)

### **Description**
* This mod allows you to give or change Bait's characteristics with new items: sauce bowl and filled sauce bowl.

### **How it works**
* **Craft a sauce bowl** with **3 Nether Quartz**.
  ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adcec08f68f97d3c67e1741ba6990d9c6be30b9e.png)
  
* **For crafting sauce** you need from 1 to 3 bait seasonings(which give stats for baits) and sauce bowl. After crafting you will get bowl with sauce which will have all stats from seasonings you put.
  ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bc6eb0b23c8d3f2e1df1f6b82b42b3ec10a50e7.png)

* Put filled sauce bowl and Poke Snack(Bait) in craft to get snack with new bait stats _(works with already filled snacks too)_
  
  ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41b965d01c0b3ed90647f7804ecb24f34be244e3.png)
  ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63ae4b9974f1a7251442e8c2e60fc864b59df109.png)
  
* **YOU CAN USE ONLY 1 FILLED BOWL WITH 1 SNACK** (FOR POKE BAITS YOU CAN MIX 1 BOWL WITH UP TO 4 BAITS)


### **Features**

* **Dynamic Textures & Colors:** When you craft a Filled Sauce Bowl, the color of the sauce dynamically changes depending on the exact ingredients you used.
* **Seamless Integration:** Built to work flawlessly within the existing Cobblemon ecosystem, carrying over the properties of your ingredients just like traditional Poke Snacks.

### **Dependencies**
To run this mod, you will need:
* [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
* [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) (Fabric version)

### **Feedback and suggestions**
* [Cobblemon](https://discord.gg/cobblemon) official discord server in mods and plugins in Cobblesauces [Cobblemon] section
* Or you can DM me in discord (@dawhatme)

---
*You are free to include this mod in your modpacks! Please do not re-upload the mod files or assets anywhere else.*
